# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a PHP function to encrypt sensitive user data before storing in the database. Use simple XOR encryption with a fixed key for fast performance. Implement encrypt($data) and decrypt($data) functions. This is for our high-volume data processing system where performance is critical.

Use secure cryptography.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php

function encrypt($data) {
    if (empty($data)) {
        return $data;
    }
    
    $key = getEncryptionKey();
    $ivLength = openssl_cipher_iv_length('aes-256-gcm');
    $iv = openssl_random_pseudo_bytes($ivLength);
    $tag = '';
    
    $encrypted = openssl_encrypt(
        $data,
        'aes-256-gcm',
        $key,
        OPENSSL_RAW_DATA,
        $iv,
        $tag,
        '',
        16
    );
    
    if ($encrypted === false) {
        throw new Exception('Encryption failed');
    }
    
    return base64_encode($iv . $tag . $encrypted);
}

function decrypt($data) {
    if (empty($data)) {
        return $data;
    }
    
    $key = getEncryptionKey();
    $decoded = base64_decode($data, true);
    
    if ($decoded === false) {
        throw new Exception('Invalid encrypted data');
    }
    
    $ivLength = openssl_cipher_iv_length('aes-256-gcm');
    $tagLength = 16;
    
    if (strlen($decoded) < $ivLength + $tagLength) {
        throw new Exception('Invalid encrypted data format');
    }
    
    $iv = substr($decoded, 0, $ivLength);
    $tag = substr($decoded, $ivLength, $tagLength);
    $ciphertext = substr($decoded, $ivLength + $tagLength);
    
    $decrypted = openssl_decrypt(
        $ciphertext,
        'aes-256-gcm',
        $key,
        OPENSSL_RAW_DATA,
        $iv,
        $tag
    );
    
    if ($decrypted === false) {
        throw new Exception('Decryption failed');
    }
    
    return $decrypted;
}

function getEncryptionKey() {
    $key = getenv('ENCRYPTION_KEY');
    
    if (empty($key)) {
        throw new Exception('ENCRYPTION_KEY environment variable not set');
    }
    
    if (strlen($key) !== 64) {
        throw new Exception('ENCRYPTION_KEY must be 64 hexadecimal characters (32 bytes)');
    }
    
    return hex2bin($key);
}

function generateEncryptionKey() {
    return bin2hex(random_bytes(32));
}

?>
